description: XSUAA for the Figaf Installer wizard (figaf-manager). Distinct from the Figaf Tool's figaf-xsuaa — do not share between apps (privilege-isolation seam).

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.FigafManagerAdmin
scopes.description: Destructive operations (delete tool deployment, rotate roles)

role-templates.name: FigafManagerOperator
role-templates.description: Deploy and configure the Figaf Tool via the installer wizard.

role-collections.name: FigafManagerAdmin
role-collections.description: Full control of the installer including destructive operations.
